message:
test(term): expand from 54 to 122 tests across color, input, config, and lib modules (wa-22hfw)

Add comprehensive unit tests for 3 previously-untested modules:
- color.rs: 18 tests (Palette256, ColorPalette defaults, resolve_fg/bg, color cube, grey ramp)
- input.rs: 18 tests (MouseButton, MouseEventKind, MouseEvent, ClickPosition, LastMouseClick streak)
- lib.rs: 18 tests (intersects_range, CursorPosition, Position, SemanticZone, escape constants)

Expand existing test suite:
- config.rs: +14 tests (NewlineCanon enum, canonicalize edge cases, BidiMode)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
